channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Repository AI: when context gets real
item.description: Repository AI cuts review cycles 35% by feeding LLMs the whole code graph instead of one file at a time. Learn the toolchain, benchmarks, and the one setup that works in a weekend.

item.title: Fix database pools: common timeout flaw
item.description: Optimize database connection pooling settings to cut costs and boost performance. Learn why small pools and longer timeouts outperform outdated advice.

item.title: 5 ways RAG pipelines collapse in prod
item.description: Cut RAG latency 75% and AWS costs 69% with Postgres + Redis + coalescing — the hidden layers most tutorials skip. 450 ms median latency, $2,100/month bill.

item.title: Instrument LLMs: what metrics actually matter
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline debugging time 70% with OpenTelemetry — prompts, vectors, costs, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: Stop burning cellular bandwidth: backend changes that
item.description: Cut 5G backend latency 69% and 5xx errors 90% with Redis 7.2 caching, pgbouncer 1.21 pooling, and TCP keep-alive tuning tuned for cellular handovers.

item.title: Freelance burnout fixed: what I cut first
item.description: Cut screen time 40% and recover from freelance burnout — exact contracts, context batching, and global latency fixes I used to drop my burnout score from 0.9 to 0.2 in 60 days

item.title: Shrink cloud carbon 37% without latency loss
item.description: Cut AWS carbon footprint 35% without latency or cost spikes — service-level carbon accounting, Redis sharding, Graviton3, and cache warming for fintech workloads

item.title: Raise rates, not excuses
item.description: Negotiate remote pay from a lower-cost country in 2026 using outcome metrics, fixed-price quotes, and currency hedging — proven with concrete salary increases and latency benchmarks.

item.title: What to charge in 2026: freelance dev rates
item.description: Set freelance developer rates that pay in 2026 — concrete numbers, real client budgets, and the spreadsheet that saved me $12k.

item.title: Avoid multi-tenant traps: schema per tenant
item.description: Cut multi-tenant database costs 75% with schema-per-tenant — real latency, cost, and scale numbers from 2026 SaaS systems.

item.title: Senior devs quit when velocity dies
item.description: story: a 30% jump in salary couldn’t fix t with Developer Burnout — a moving target.

item.title: No CS degree? Don’t let it slow you down
item.description: nd, learn 80% of what they need on the job. with CS degree Don you — the degree, you’re fighting an uphill battle.

item.title: When Vector DBs are overkill
item.description: Vector DBs vs PostgreSQL: Compare cost, latency, and scale for embedding search. Save 90% on costs by choosing the right tool for your dataset size.

item.title: Master Remote Tech Interviews as a Self-Taught Dev
item.description: Pass remote tech interviews without polished apps — use a problem-solving journal instead. Learn how self-taught engineers land roles with real debugging stories, not side projects. 2026 guide.

item.title: Streamline Zero-Trust for Teams Under 50
item.description: Reduce auth failures 90% and cut cloud bills 30% with lightweight zero trust—no VPNs, no firewalls, just hardware keys and short-lived tokens. Works for teams under 50 engineers in 2026.

item.title: Fancy stacks cost 200% more
item.description: Cut AWS costs 71% and latency 72% by replacing microservices with a single Go process — the real cost of over-engineering exposed with hard numbers and benchmarks.

item.title: Edge functions in 2026: save or hemorrhage cash
item.description: Save $2k/month on API costs with edge functions — real latency and cost data for Cloudflare Workers vs Vercel Edge in 2026, plus the mistakes most teams make.

item.title: AI skills vs frameworks: what boosts salaries
item.description: In 2026, AI salaries hinge on core skills vs tool mastery. Learn which expertise pays more, from foundational ML to frameworks like Hugging Face and TensorFlow.

item.title: Nairobi & Lagos devs score $4k remote roles
item.description: Land $4k/month remote jobs as a developer in Nairobi or Lagos. Strategy guide: GitHub upgrades, interview prep, and payment tools for global roles.

item.title: Price Your Work, Not Their Budget
item.description: Set freelance developer rates 2026 with a data-backed calculator — taxes, buffer, client risk multipliers, and real 2026 market benchmarks included. Avoid underpricing traps and negotiation regrets.
